options.a: It is a document used to assist in carrying out a check on the external appearance of dangerous goods and their associated paperwork.
options.b: It is used by Pilots to hand over the aircarft in a fit and proper state to the next duty crew after a commercial flight.
options.c: It is used when accepting aircraft back into service after a period of routine maintenance.
options.d: It allows maintenace personnel to accept an aircaft defect until the next scheduled maintenance event if it is not deemed detrimental to flight safety.
